name: Twilio
description: Twilio provides cloud communications APIs for sending SMS/MMS messages, making voice calls, and managing phone numbers. Build communication workflows programmatically.

auth.description: Use Account SID as username and Auth Token as password

capabilities.name: messages_create
capabilities.description: Send an SMS or MMS message to a phone number.

capabilities.name: messages_list
capabilities.description: List sent and received messages with optional filtering.

capabilities.name: messages_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve a specific message by SID.

capabilities.name: calls_list
capabilities.description: List calls made to and from the account.

capabilities.name: calls_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve a specific call by SID.

capabilities.name: calls_update
capabilities.description: Modify a live call (redirect, end, pause recording).

capabilities.name: phone_numbers_list
capabilities.description: List all phone numbers owned by the account.

capabilities.name: phone_numbers_purchase
capabilities.description: Purchase and provision a new phone number.

capabilities.name: phone_numbers_delete
capabilities.description: Release a phone number from the account.

capabilities.name: available_numbers_search
capabilities.description: Search for available phone numbers to purchase.
